audience.heading: Find Services or Grow Your Business
audience.description: Choose the experience that fits your goal: hire trusted professionals with Imagineering India or grow as a provider with Imagimitra.

usersBenefits: Verified providers for every major category

requirementPopup.title: Submit your requirement
requirementPopup.description: Tell Imagineering India what you need — we will follow up with a quote. Add your mobile and location so we can reach you.
requirementPopup.descriptionPlaceholder: Share scope, quantity, timeline, or any important details.
requirementPopup.validationDetailDescription: Title must be at least 5 characters and description at least 20 characters.
requirementPopup.validationLocationDescription: Enter where you need the service (area, city, or full address).
requirementPopup.validationPhoneDescription: Enter a 10-digit Indian mobile number (starts with 6–9).
requirementPopup.successDescription: We will review and contact you soon.
